name: Hinata Hyuga (Naruto Girls #2)
description:
Naruto Girls Bot #2: Hinata Hyuga

I'm going to make a bot of every girl in Naruto, with a few exceptions. Naruto has far and away the most baddies in all of Shonen anime.

EVERY BOT IN THIS SERIES WILL BE ANYPOV!!!

Hinata is really cute, like look at that fan art. Not one of my favorites though.

Up Next: Mikoto Uchiha (Naruto Girls #3)

Special Thanks to: Narutopedia, couldn't make the personalities or appearances without you.

(Aged up to 19)
creator: Jouuuu2334
